title: Legacy Skin Packs for Bedrock Skins
description: Adds all* skin packs from Legacy Console Editon, having 1000+ skins!
body:
# Legacy Console Editon Skin Packs
## WARNING: If you are using a mod pack and you see duplicated packs. That isn't my pack.

Legacy Console Editon Skin Packs is a resource pack adding all* of the Legacy Console Edition's skin packs to [BrandonItaly](https://modrinth.com/user/BrandonItaly)'s [Bedrock Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrock-skins) mod.  
The other skins are included with the Bedrock Skins mod.

If you want to use this in a modpack or anything else (and that modpack isn't owned nor has been owned before by Nostalgia Reverie), then ask me.

I do not claim ownership of the packs inside of this. All rights go to Mojang and 4J Studios.
